heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which credited funds to the Shoshone-Bannock Tribes of the Fort Hall Reservation for certain claims, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–206, § 285 Stat. 737Dec. 18, 1971
